scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const p1=path.resolve('../node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js'); const p2=path.resolve('./node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js'); const vitePath=fs.existsSync(p1)?p1:p2; require('child_process').fork(vitePath, ['build']).on('exit', process.exit)"
